Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos And Ntc Of Mtn For Order Determining Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jean Tepper, Esq., 415.788.6151, for defendant/judgment creditor Robert White; No other appearances.

RULING: The Claim of exemption of plaintiff/judgment debtor Carol L. Price is denied. Claimant has not demonstrated that the subject trust is not subject to enforcement of the money judgment pursuant to Fin. Code 17410. Claimant has not demonstrated that the money judgment arises out of any claim against a trustee acting as an escrow agent. (Fin. Code 17410(a).) Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Appearances: Susan C. Rushakoff of the Law Offices of Robert E. White (788.6151) for defendant and moving party; Armenak Kavcioglu of Raisin & Kavcioglu (818.728.4998) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party.
Argued and the court ruled as follows: overruled as to the first cause of action and sustained without leave to amend as to the second cause of action. The court will prepare a form of order. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
